replacements.from: {0} This tool is from '{1}' (MCP Server). Note that MCP servers or malicious conversation content may attempt to misuse '{2}' through tools. Please carefully review any requested actions.
replacements.to: {0} 这个工具来自“{1}”（MCP 服务器）。请注意，MCP 服务器或恶意对话内容可能会尝试通过工具滥用“{2}”。请仔细核查所有请求的操作。

replacements.from: This browser was created by an Agent. Closing it may impact a running chat.
replacements.to: 这个浏览器标签页由 Agent 创建，关闭它可能会影响正在运行的对话。

replacements.from: MCP server `{0}` has tools with invalid parameters which will be omitted.
replacements.to: MCP 服务器 `{0}` 中有些工具参数无效，将被忽略。

replacements.from: Connect to a remote HTTP server that implements the MCP protocol
replacements.to: 连接到实现 MCP 协议的远程 HTTP 服务器

replacements.from: Indicates whether there are MCP servers with unknown tools.
replacements.to: 表示是否存在带未知工具的 MCP 服务器。

replacements.from: Context key that has the number of registered MCP servers
replacements.to: 记录已注册 MCP 服务器数量的上下文键

replacements.from: Indicates whether there are any MCP servers with errors.
replacements.to: 表示是否存在出错的 MCP 服务器。

replacements.from: Context key that has the number of registered MCP tools
replacements.to: 记录已注册 MCP 工具数量的上下文键

replacements.from: Run a local command that implements the MCP protocol
replacements.to: 运行实现 MCP 协议的本地命令

replacements.from: URL of the MCP server (e.g., http://localhost:3000)
replacements.to: MCP 服务器的 URL（例如：http://localhost:3000）

replacements.from: "Are you sure you want to close this window?"
Are you sure you want to close this window?
Choose the type of MCP server to add
replacements.to: 选择要添加的 MCP 服务器类型
安装 MCP 服务器 {0} 时出错：{1}

replacements.from: Expected an array of MCP collections
replacements.to: 预期应为 MCP 集合数组

replacements.from: Requires a restart to take effect.

replacements.to: 复制浏览器链接到剪贴板
正在 Cursor 浏览器中打开 {0}
复制浏览器 URI 到剪贴板
信任来自 {0} 的 MCP 服务器吗？
重新加载浏览器标签页

replacements.from: Choose how Agent runs tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes. Tools will auto-run in a sandbox if possible. If not, they will respect the allowlist or ask for approval.
replacements.to: 选择 Agent 运行工具（如命令执行、MCP 与文件写入）的方式。若可能，工具会在沙箱中自动运行；否则将遵循允许列表或请求批准。

replacements.from: "Skills are specialized capabilities that help the agent accomplish specific tasks. Skills will be invoked by the agent when relevant or can be triggered manually with / in chat."
replacements.to: "技能是帮助 agent 完成特定任务的专用能力。相关时，agent 会自动调用技能，你也可以在聊天中通过 / 手动触发。"

replacements.from: Skills are specialized capabilities that help the agent accomplish specific tasks. Skills will be invoked by the agent when relevant or can be triggered manually with / in chat.
replacements.to: 技能是帮助 agent 完成特定任务的专用能力。相关时，agent 会自动调用技能，你也可以在聊天中通过 / 手动触发。

replacements.from: MCP tools that can run automatically. Format: 'server:tool', 'server:*' for all tools from a server, '*:tool' for a tool from any server, or *:* for all tools from all servers
replacements.to: 可自动运行的 MCP 工具。格式：'server:tool'；'server:*' 表示某服务的全部工具；'*:tool' 表示任意服务的某工具；*:* 表示全部服务的全部工具

replacements.from: "Custom keywords that trigger auto-submit in voice mode. Only single words (no spaces) are allowed. Punctuation and capitalization are ignored."
replacements.to: "在语音模式下触发自动提交的自定义关键词。仅允许单个词语（不含空格）。会忽略标点和大小写。"

replacements.from: "HTTP/2 is recommended for low-latency streaming. In some corporate proxy and VPN environments, the compatibility mode may need to be lowered."
replacements.to: "推荐使用 HTTP/2 以获得低延迟流式体验。在部分企业代理和 VPN 环境中，可能需要降低兼容模式。"

replacements.from: "Hooks let you run custom scripts at specific points during the agent's execution to modify behavior, enforce policies, or add custom logging."
replacements.to: "钩子允许你在 agent 执行过程中的特定时机运行自定义脚本，以修改行为、实施策略或添加自定义日志。"

replacements.from: "Use Rules to guide agent behavior, like enforcing best practices or coding standards. Rules can be applied always, by file path, or manually."
replacements.to: "使用规则来引导 agent 行为，例如强制执行最佳实践或编码规范。规则可以始终应用、按文件路径应用，或手动应用。"

replacements.from: Custom keywords that trigger auto-submit in voice mode. Only single words (no spaces) are allowed. Punctuation and capitalization are ignored.
replacements.to: 在语音模式下触发自动提交的自定义关键词。仅允许单个词语（不含空格）。会忽略标点和大小写。

replacements.from: HTTP/2 is recommended for low-latency streaming. In some corporate proxy and VPN environments, the compatibility mode may need to be lowered.
replacements.to: 推荐使用 HTTP/2 以获得低延迟流式体验。在部分企业代理和 VPN 环境中，可能需要降低兼容模式。

replacements.from: Hooks let you run custom scripts at specific points during the agent's execution to modify behavior, enforce policies, or add custom logging.
replacements.to: 钩子允许你在 agent 执行过程中的特定时机运行自定义脚本，以修改行为、实施策略或添加自定义日志。

replacements.from: Use Rules to guide agent behavior, like enforcing best practices or coding standards. Rules can be applied always, by file path, or manually.
replacements.to: 使用规则来引导 agent 行为，例如强制执行最佳实践或编码规范。规则可以始终应用、按文件路径应用，或手动应用。

replacements.from: "Create reusable workflows triggered with / prefix in chat. Use commands to standardize processes and make common tasks more efficient."
replacements.to: "创建可在聊天中通过 / 前缀触发的可复用工作流。使用命令可以标准化流程，并让常见任务更高效。"

replacements.from: Create reusable workflows triggered with / prefix in chat. Use commands to standardize processes and make common tasks more efficient.
replacements.to: 创建可在聊天中通过 / 前缀触发的可复用工作流。使用命令可以标准化流程，并让常见任务更高效。

replacements.from: "By default, get notifications for stable updates. In Early Access, pre-release builds may be unstable for production work."
replacements.to: "默认接收稳定版本更新通知。在 Early Access 通道中，预发布版本可能不适合生产环境。"

replacements.from: By default, get notifications for stable updates. In Early Access, pre-release builds may be unstable for production work.
replacements.to: 默认接收稳定版本更新通知。在 Early Access 通道中，预发布版本可能不适合生产环境。

replacements.from: "Create specialized agents for complex tasks. Subagents can be invoked by the agent to handle focused work in parallel."
replacements.to: "为复杂任务创建专用智能体。agent 可以调用子智能体并行处理聚焦工作。"

replacements.from: Create specialized agents for complex tasks. Subagents can be invoked by the agent to handle focused work in parallel.
replacements.to: 为复杂任务创建专用智能体。agent 可以调用子智能体并行处理聚焦工作。

replacements.from: Domains that Agent can fetch from automatically. Use '*' for all domains, '*.example.com' for wildcard subdomains.
replacements.to: Agent 可自动抓取的域名。使用 '*' 表示所有域名，'*.example.com' 表示通配子域名。

replacements.from: Embed codebase for improved contextual understanding and knowledge. Embeddings and metadata are stored in the
replacements.to: 将代码库嵌入索引以提升上下文理解与知识检索。嵌入向量和元数据存储在

replacements.from: Tools will auto-run in a sandbox if possible. If not, they will respect the allowlist or ask for approval.
replacements.to: 若可能，工具会在沙箱中自动运行；否则将遵循允许列表或请求批准。

replacements.from: "These domains must be accessible for Cursor to function. Add them to your firewall or proxy allowlist."
replacements.to: "这些域名必须可访问，Cursor 才能正常工作。请将它们加入防火墙或代理白名单。"

replacements.from: These domains must be accessible for Cursor to function. Add them to your firewall or proxy allowlist.

replacements.from: "Use the legacy terminal tool in agent mode, for use on systems with unsupported shell configurations"
replacements.to: "在 Agent 模式下使用旧版终端工具，适用于 shell 配置不受支持的系统"

replacements.from: Automatically index repositories to speed up Grep searches. All data is stored locally.
replacements.to: 自动索引仓库以加速 Grep 搜索。所有数据仅保存在本地。

replacements.from: "Enable on-demand usage to go beyond your plan's included usage. Requires a paid plan."

replacements.from: "On-Demand usage is consumed after a usage limit is reached, and is billed in arrears."

replacements.from: WARNING: Setting this to a non-localhost address (e.g., 0.0.0.0) exposes this endpoint to the external network, which is potentially dangerous as it allows remote access to the log ingestion endpoint.
replacements.to: 警告：设置为非 localhost 地址（如 0.0.0.0）会将该端点暴露到外部网络，可能带来安全风险。

replacements.from: Port for NDJSON ingest server. Set to 0 for auto-allocation in range 7242-7942.
replacements.to: NDJSON 导入服务端口。设为 0 时会在 7242-7942 范围内自动分配。

replacements.from: HTTP server for ingesting NDJSON logs to workspace/.cursor/debug.log
replacements.to: 将 NDJSON 日志导入到 workspace/.cursor/debug.log 的 HTTP 服务器

replacements.from: Address to bind the NDJSON ingest server to.
replacements.to: NDJSON 导入服务的绑定地址。

replacements.from: Cursor NDJSON Ingest: Copy curl command
replacements.to: Cursor NDJSON Ingest：复制 curl 命令

replacements.from: Cursor NDJSON Ingest: Show server info
replacements.to: Cursor NDJSON Ingest：显示服务信息
工作区扩展宿主的 Polyfill

replacements.from: Background composer remote authority resolver for Cursor
replacements.to: Cursor 后台 composer 的远程权限解析器

replacements.from: Connection token provider for Cursor resolver
replacements.to: 为 Cursor 解析器提供 Connection Token

replacements.from: Handles indexing and retrieval for Cursor
replacements.to: 为 Cursor 处理索引与检索

replacements.from: TCP/TLS socket provider for Cursor extensions
replacements.to: 为 Cursor 扩展提供 TCP/TLS 套接字能力

replacements.from: Provides TextMate-only syntax highlighting for .cursor/worktrees files without activating language servers.
replacements.to: 在不激活语言服务器的情况下，为 .cursor/worktrees 文件提供仅 TextMate 的语法高亮
